svg.text: Cucox Lab — Architecture (Phase 1 / Phase 2 target state)
Home network — Default VLAN (untouched). Lab is firewalled-off from this segment.
Claude Code · kubectl · terraform · ssh · sops
Proxmox VE Host — lab-prox01 · Ryzen 9 5950X (16C/32T) · 64 GB DDR4 · 2× NVMe Gen4 · 2.5 GbE NIC
vmbr0 — physical 2.5 GbE — trunk: native VLAN 10 (mgmt), tagged VLAN 20 (cluster), VLAN 30 (dmz)
3× control-plane (embedded etcd HA — quorum survives 1 loss)
k3s cluster — Pod CIDR 10.42.0.0/16 · Service CIDR 10.43.0.0/16
· LoadBalancer Services get MetalLB VIPs in 10.10.20.50–99
· Phase 4: Longhorn replaces local-path; Loki adds logs
into the cluster as a Deployment
ZFS tank — NVMe #2 (1 TB Gen4, ex-Pi5)
Two independent pools — not striped or mirrored.
Losing one drive loses one pool, not both.
Bench scratch isolated from VM-disk I/O.
Terraform points new VM disks at tank by default.
Default → mgmt: operator-IP only · 22/443/6443/8006 · Default → cluster/dmz: NONE · cluster → Default LAN: NONE (NAS isolated)
mgmt → cluster: ALL · mgmt → dmz: ALL · cluster → mgmt: 53/123 only (DNS/NTP)
cluster → dmz: 443→ingress, 7844→cloudflared · dmz → cluster: 443→ingress only · dmz → mgmt: NONE
Internet → any lab VLAN: NONE (Cloudflare Tunnel only) · any lab VLAN → Internet: as needed (egress filter is Phase 4)
ZBF gotchas: rule-order within zone-pair · Local-In ≠ Inter-VLAN · Return traffic needs explicit Established,Related rule in opposite direction
